title: codereview-pass1-initiator-function
description: Reviewed edhoc_initiator_process_msg2: fixed TH_3 to use CIPHERTEXT_2 (P2 correctness); updated context_3 to omit TH_3 matching sig_structure (P1 security); TH_4 now uses CIPHERTEXT_3 (P2 transcript leak prevention).
